guide.importance: Understanding {category} in {country} is essential for compliance and planning. This guide walks you through the key concepts, requirements, and best practices.
guide.point_1: Understand the current tax rates and thresholds
guide.point_2: Know your filing obligations and deadlines
guide.point_4: Consult a tax professional for complex situations
guide.official_resources_text: For the most accurate and up-to-date information, visit the official tax authority:
about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: TaxPortal is a comprehensive international tax platform providing accurate, up-to-date tax information and calculators for individuals and businesses worldwide.
about.mission_text: To make international tax information accessible, understandable, and actionable for everyone. We believe that navigating complex tax systems should not be a barrier to global opportunity.
about.vision_text: A world where anyone can confidently understand and comply with tax obligations in any country, regardless of their background or expertise.
about.global_coverage_text: Comprehensive tax data for over 10 countries and growing.
about.free_access_text: All basic tools and guides are completely free to use.
about.privacy_first_text: No personal data required. All calculations happen in your browser.
about.always_updated_text: Regular updates reflecting the latest tax laws and rates.
about.expert_reviewed_text: Content reviewed by tax professionals for accuracy.
about.accuracy_text: We strive to provide the most accurate and up-to-date tax information possible, sourced directly from official government resources.
about.accessibility_text: We are committed to making tax information accessible to everyone, regardless of background or technical expertise.
about.privacy_text: We do not collect or store personal information. All calculations are performed locally in your browser.
about.transparency_text: We clearly indicate when information is illustrative and should be verified with a qualified tax professional.
about.contact_text: For inquiries, feedback, or suggestions, please reach out through our contact channels. We value your input in making TaxPortal better.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use TaxPortal.
privacy.no_personal_data: We do not require any personal information to use our calculators and guides. All calculations are performed locally in your browser.
privacy.cookies: We may use cookies to improve your experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.third_party: We do not share your information with third parties.
privacy.changes: We may update this policy from time to time. Please check this page for the latest version.
privacy.calculations_local_detail: All tax calculations are performed directly in your browser. No calculation data is sent to our servers or stored anywhere.
privacy.contact_detail: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please reach out through our contact channels.
not_found.title: 404 - Page Not Found
not_found.message: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
not_found.suggestion: It might have been removed, renamed, or doesn't exist.
